rationale: In the methodology section, the authors state they adopt a parsimonious error-correction specification and cite Fok et al. (2006) as a prior marketing application. They also specifically refer to Fok et al. for an in-depth discussion of the ECM, indicating a functional methodological role rather than a generic literature-list mention. Although the model is extended with business-cycle interactions and estimated via 3SLS instead of hierarchical Bayes, the citation supports the core dynamic elasticity framework used in the paper.
relation_description: The citing paper applies an error-correction modeling approach for short- and long-term elasticity estimation and explicitly uses Fok et al. (2006) as a methodological precedent and explanatory source. It adapts that framework to a new setting, namely business-cycle variation in price and advertising effectiveness.
